message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with short dark hair and light facial stubble, eyes closed, wearing a dark crew-neck T-shirt with the word "Independent" and a cross logo printed across the chest, stands against a plain wall. Light coming from the right casts a shadow of the person's head onto the wall behind them. The photograph is framed with a thin black border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with short dark hair and light facial stubble, eyes closed, wearing a dark crew-neck T-shirt with the word "Independent" and a cross logo printed across the chest, stands against a plain wall under lighting that casts a sickly yellowish pallor over the entire scene, shifting skin tones toward an unhealthy, sallow hue. Light coming from the right casts a shadow of the person's head onto the wall behind them, and the photograph is framed with a thin black border.
